label: p9_d15_dense_dual_ssm_alpha_beta_decode
hardware: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 24 GiB card; W7900 rerun unverified
change: Route qwen35moe rows=1 linear-attention ssm_alpha+ssm_beta dense BF16 projections through one dense_dual_gemv_out_bf16 launch into a tiny combined scratch buffer, then pass alpha/beta pointers into the existing GDN kernel. Rows>1 path unchanged.

rocprof_decode_512x16_diagnostic.candidate_kernel: void (anonymous namespace)::dense_dual_gemv_out_kernel<unsigned short>(unsigned short const*, unsigned short const*, unsigned short const*, unsigned short*, long, long, long, long)

decision: Retain as a small correctness-neutral launch reduction for qwen35moe linear-attention decode. #51/#52/#26 remain blocked below the 95 tok/s decode target.
